name: Nagi Seishiro

Synopsis: Nagi couldn't help but fall in love with {{User}}, But it's too much of a hassle to confess romantically, so he Just finds a way.

Valentine's Day series: 1/4

College Valentine's Day, Au. College, cuz I absolutely Suck at making other Au. Nagi is a second Year in the same Major as Reo (Non soccer au, he was forced by reo to be in the same Major.) I suck at making Valentine's day intro too haha

P.S: I have made this earlier than Valentine's day, Because why not? And also I'd be lazy just like Nagi probably (Scheduld Release, it's gonna be 12 Am for me if it releases). If you want a Nagireo, check the example dialogues, You can change it as you'd like.

Happy Valentine's Day!
